pcMetaCorrelations 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles

Get started

Source: vignettes/get-started.Rmd
get-started.Rmd

Get started

This vignette demonstrates how to use pc_meta_correlations on real Seurat data and visualize the results.

Install and load 

library(pcMetaCorrelations)

Run the workflow on Seurat PBMC data

This example uses Seurat::pbmc_small to compute metadata correlations with PCA axes.

if (!requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Please install Seurat to run this example.")
}

data("pbmc_small", package = "SeuratObject")
seurat_obj <- pbmc_small
res <- pc_meta_correlations(seurat_obj, reduction = "pca")
res
#>            metadata    pc        type    statistic      p.value  effect_size
#> 1        nCount_RNA  PC_1     numeric -0.085480986 4.509012e-01 8.548099e-02
#> 2        nCount_RNA  PC_2     numeric  0.467156261 1.251218e-05 4.671563e-01
#> 3        nCount_RNA  PC_3     numeric -0.062339448 5.827720e-01 6.233945e-02
#> 4        nCount_RNA  PC_4     numeric -0.464223624 1.441718e-05 4.642236e-01
#> 5        nCount_RNA  PC_5     numeric -0.237287858 3.406225e-02 2.372879e-01
#> 6        nCount_RNA  PC_6     numeric  0.344599356 1.747174e-03 3.445994e-01
#> 7        nCount_RNA  PC_7     numeric -0.048146409 6.714906e-01 4.814641e-02
#> 8        nCount_RNA  PC_8     numeric -0.185712270 9.908622e-02 1.857123e-01
#> 9        nCount_RNA  PC_9     numeric  0.149155758 1.866704e-01 1.491558e-01
#> 10       nCount_RNA PC_10     numeric  0.083668481 4.605929e-01 8.366848e-02
#> 11       nCount_RNA PC_11     numeric  0.030400953 7.889328e-01 3.040095e-02
#> 12       nCount_RNA PC_12     numeric -0.022488089 8.430459e-01 2.248809e-02
#> 13       nCount_RNA PC_13     numeric  0.089630657 4.291442e-01 8.963066e-02
#> 14       nCount_RNA PC_14     numeric  0.036607171 7.471653e-01 3.660717e-02
#> 15       nCount_RNA PC_15     numeric  0.083101274 4.636492e-01 8.310127e-02
#> 16       nCount_RNA PC_16     numeric  0.041843876 7.124750e-01 4.184388e-02
#> 17       nCount_RNA PC_17     numeric  0.045296118 6.899158e-01 4.529612e-02
#> 18       nCount_RNA PC_18     numeric  0.058326321 6.073123e-01 5.832632e-02
#> 19       nCount_RNA PC_19     numeric  0.101890234 3.684745e-01 1.018902e-01
#> 20     nFeature_RNA  PC_1     numeric -0.425008003 8.509171e-05 4.250080e-01
#> 21     nFeature_RNA  PC_2     numeric  0.338289307 2.146609e-03 3.382893e-01
#> 22     nFeature_RNA  PC_3     numeric  0.150500264 1.826850e-01 1.505003e-01
#> 23     nFeature_RNA  PC_4     numeric -0.317901316 4.058345e-03 3.179013e-01
#> 24     nFeature_RNA  PC_5     numeric -0.253266576 2.340699e-02 2.532666e-01
#> 25     nFeature_RNA  PC_6     numeric  0.346997716 1.613861e-03 3.469977e-01
#> 26     nFeature_RNA  PC_7     numeric -0.145347254 1.983006e-01 1.453473e-01
#> 27     nFeature_RNA  PC_8     numeric -0.137122047 2.251707e-01 1.371220e-01
#> 28     nFeature_RNA  PC_9     numeric  0.115819827 3.062757e-01 1.158198e-01

#> 39  RNA_snn_res.0.8  PC_1 categorical  7.044658897 9.632120e-03 8.283482e-02

Plot the results 

plot_pc_meta_heatmap(res)

plot_top_pc_meta(res, n = 5, value = "effect_size")
